subcodes.title: Words to the Seattle and Portland friends, spoken on 1912-10-21
subcodes.first_line: Welcome, very, very welcome. These friends who have come from Seattle and Portland have taken a great deal of trouble to come here.
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @unity in diversity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
